writing.title: Writing Task 1: Directions to my house
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) giving directions to your house, using this/that/these/those.
writing.sampleAnswer: Go straight along this street, then turn left at the corner. That building is the library, next to my house. Those shops are open until 9 p.m.
checklist: Dùng đúng this/that cho vật gần/xa
Dùng đúng these/those cho số nhiều
Chỉ đường rõ ràng, có thứ tự

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Review — Describe your hometown
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 50 words) describing your hometown. Use vocabulary and grammar from Chương 1 (be, have/has, there is/are, prepositions of place).
writing.sampleAnswer: I am from a small town. There is a small house near my hometown with a beautiful garden. My family isn't big, but we are happy. There is a park opposite the supermarket, and the school is between the bank and the post office.
checklist: Kết hợp được ít nhất 3 cấu trúc đã học trong Chương 1
Đoạn văn có mở-thân-kết đơn giản
Đủ số từ tối thiểu yêu cầu
